Proj 7.1.1 datum restored and option for data with a pkg-message

pkg-message comes from OpenBSD Readme http://cvsweb.openbsd.org/cgi-bin/cvsweb/ports/devel/proj/pkg/README?rev=1.1&content-type=text/x-cvsweb-markup (thanks to Landry)
